title: Access to books of other state offices
doc_html:
§311.  Access to books of other state offices

The state treasurer shall have free access to the books of all offices of the state, for the inspection of all books, accounts and papers which may concern the duties of his office.  

Acts 1976, No. 428, §1, eff. July 31, 1976.
doc_text:
§311.  Access to books of other state offices
The state treasurer shall have free access to the books of all offices of the state, for the inspection of all books, accounts and papers which may concern the duties of his office.
Acts 1976, No. 428, §1, eff. July 31, 1976.
